name.jp: 殲滅シーケンス稼働【高熱】

description.en: Increases <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> of an ally, and has a <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Burned</color> on the enemy target for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 아군 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 증가시키고, <color=#28d9ed>75%</color> 확률로 적 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>화상</color>을 부여합니다.
description.jp: 味方単体の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>をUPさせ、敵単体に<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>火傷</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 使1名友军的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>提升,并有<color=#28d9ed>75%</color>的几率对敌人目标造成<color=#28d9ed>烧伤</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。
